nasb.text: He was also saying to them, “You are experts at setting aside the commandment of God in order to keep your tradition.

esv.text: And he said to them, “You have a fine way of rejecting the commandment of God in order to establish your tradition!

cnv.text: 耶穌又對他們說：“你們為了堅守自己的傳統，而巧妙地把　神的誡命拒絕了。

ccb.text: 耶稣又对他们说：“你们为了拘守自己的传统，竟巧妙地废除了上帝的诫命。

csbs.text: 耶稣又对他们说：“你们为了要守住你们的传统，竟然弃绝了神的命令！
